content.text:
Verification complete. All 6 active tests pass (4 remaining as `it.todo()`).

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No changes needed. The existing logic at `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-11_01-59-11_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/game-of-life.ts` already correctly handles overpopulation through the rule `(isAlive && count === 2) || count === 3`. A live cell with more than three neighbors fails both conditions and is excluded from the result.
- Result: All tests now pass (6 passing, 4 todo)
- Approach: Minimal — no code modification required because the existing survival rule inherently excludes overpopulated cells. Adding extra logic would violate minimalism.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
